attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.LINE_NUM, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.SET_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.SET_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ITEM_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ORG_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ORDERED_QTY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.MLQ_QTY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.MLQ_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.PLANNER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.VIOLATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.CRD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.MANUAL_SSD, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.LINE_PROCESSING_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.SS_PROCESSING_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ITEM_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.OPTION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.DISPOSITIONED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.DISPOSTIONED_DATE 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS,
 (
 select ORDER_NUMBER ,LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS
 minus
 select ORDER_NUMBER ,LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ORDERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ORDER_NUMBER = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.ORDER_NUMBER and ACM.LINE_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.LINE_ID AND ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ODRS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_MLQ_FAIL_ORDERS)
